_publications._publicationTitle: Exploring transcriptional regulators Ref-1 and STAT3 as therapeutic targets in malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumours.

_contextSnippet: Both APX2009 (35 mg/kg) and Napa (75 mg/kg) decreased the tumour volume (Fig. 6a, P < 0.05) with a corresponding decrease in tumour weight at the end of study
details: Both APX2009 (35 mg/kg) and Napa (75 mg/kg) decreased tumor volume with corresponding decrease in tumor weight at end of study
